title: Tale Of 2 Cities
text: U.S. equity markets extended their rebound this week as a strong slate of earnings reports clashed with renewed concerns over financial instability and economic data that provided fodder for both bulls and bears. Closing at its highest levels since early February, the S&P 500 advanced 0.9%, but gains were skewed towards larger companies. The Mid-Cap 400 slipped 0.3%, and the Small-Cap 600 declined 1.0%.

title: Is A Commercial Real Estate Crisis Coming? These Experts Say No
text: People seem to think that commercial real estate is crashing. The truth is the opposite. Lower quality Class B and C office buildings are indeed suffering mightily right now, while Class A office is mainly suffering from negative sentiment.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities: A Fresh Look After Q1 Results
text: Names in the multi-family residential space are down considerably and represent a potential buy opportunity here for investors willing to look past economic cycle problems. I explain why I consider Mid-America Apartment Communities my top pick.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Beats Q1 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $2.28 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.25 per share. This compares to FFO of $1.97 per share a year ago.

title: Residential REITs Set to Shine in Q1 2023 Amid Demand Rebound
text: Discover how top residential REITs like AVB, EQR, UDR and MAA are positioned for growth as the demand for apartments rebounds in the first quarter of 2023.

title: What Awaits Mid-America Apartment (MAA) This Earnings Season?
text: Mid-America Apartment's (MAA) Q1 results are likely to reflect the healthy demand for apartment units in its markets.

title: Dividend Growth Investing Like Peter Lynch
text: Although Peter Lynch wasn't explicitly a dividend growth investor, his principles and advice are highly applicable to a dividend growth strategy. Certain categories and sectors of stocks work better for dividend growth investors than others.

title: MAA Announces Date of First Quarter 2023 Earnings Release, Conference Call
text: GERMANTOWN, Tenn. , April 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MAA (NYSE: MAA) announced today that the Company expects to release its first quarter 2023 results on Wednesday, April 26, 2023, after market close and will hold a conference call on Thursday, April 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m.

title: The 3 Most Overvalued REITs
text: Even cheap sectors have overpriced stocks. We examine 3 of the most overpriced REITs.

title: 17 Fast-Growing REITs With 17 Strong Balance Sheets
text: A FROG is a REIT that shows a Fast Rate of Growth and a strong balance sheet. This article discusses how to identify a FROG, and lists all the FROGs as we head deeper into 2023.
